title: rhinanthus pectinatus
intro: Rhinanthus pectinatus, also known as the yellow rattle, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhinanthus pectinatus include its ability to support respiratory health, relieve digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Rhinanthus pectinatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
